resultRaw.sql: SELECT c.course_type AS course_type, AVG(c.credits) AS avg_credits FROM public.courses c GROUP BY c.course_type ORDER BY c.course_type;

issues: metadata.rowCount is 5 but sample contains only 2 rows — incomplete sample could hide other categories.
Chart sorts course_type alphabetically (SQL ORDER BY course_type); if the user expected ranking by average credits, consider sorting by avg_credits instead (this is a preference, not an error).
